ddls:
CREATE TABLE "evaluation_runs" (
  "runid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation run */,
  "topic" INTEGER /* Topic ID associated with the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation run was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the evaluation run */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the evaluation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_runs_topic FOREIGN KEY ("topic") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "runid" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run */,
  "ERR_IA_5" REAL /* ERR-IA score at 5 relevancy levels */,
  "ERR_IA_10" REAL /* ERR-IA score at 10 relevancy levels */,
  "ERR_IA_20" REAL /* ERR-IA score at 20 relevancy levels */,
  "alpha_nDCG_5" REAL /* alpha-nDCG score at 5 relevancy levels */,
  "alpha_nDCG_10" REAL /* alpha-nDCG score at 10 relevancy levels */,
  "alpha_nDCG_20" REAL /* alpha-nDCG score at 20 relevancy levels */,
  "strec_5" REAL /* strec score at 5 relevancy levels */,
  "strec_10" REAL /* strec score at 10 relevancy levels */,
  "strec_20" REAL /* strec score at 20 relevancy levels */,
  "additional_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics stored as JSON */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_runid FOREIGN KEY ("runid") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("runid")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the topic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_runs" (
  "user_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-run relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user conducting the evaluation */,
  "runid" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run being conducted */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the user's contribution to the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_runs_runid FOREIGN KEY ("runid") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("runid")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "runid" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_parameters_runid FOREIGN KEY ("runid") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("runid")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "runid" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the run (e.g., completed, in-progress) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_status_runid FOREIGN KEY ("runid") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("runid")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "runid" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error encountered */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was logged */,
  "error_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the error (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the error has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_runid FOREIGN KEY ("runid") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("runid")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "runid" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run */,
  "report_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_runid FOREIGN KEY ("runid") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("runid")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "runid" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the evaluation method or parameter */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details about the changes made */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was recorded */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_runid FOREIGN KEY ("runid") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("runid")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard entry */,
  "runid" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard stored as JSON */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_runid FOREIGN KEY ("runid") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("runid")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation entry */,
  "runid" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the annotation */,
  "annotated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_runid FOREIGN KEY ("runid") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("runid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "runid" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., editor, viewer) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaborator joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_runid FOREIGN KEY ("runid") REFERENCES evaluation_runs ("runid")
)
